'''dodharaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:twelveteenth|twelveteenth]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-dh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:twelveteenth|twelveteenth]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dodharaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dodharithi|dodharithi]] || [[word:dodhariji|dodhariji]] || [[word:dodharishi|dodharishi]] || [[word:dodhariki|dodhariki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dodharuthuthu|dodharuthuthu]] || [[word:dodharujuju|dodharujuju]] || [[word:dodharushushu|dodharushushu]] || [[word:dodharukuku|dodharukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dodharuthu|dodharuthu]] || [[word:dodharuju|dodharuju]] || [[word:dodharushu|dodharushu]] || [[word:dodharuku|dodharuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dodharufthuf|dodharufthuf]] || [[word:dodharufjuf|dodharufjuf]] || [[word:dodharufshuf|dodharufshuf]] || [[word:dodharufkuf|dodharufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dodharethe|dodharethe]] || [[word:dodhareje|dodhareje]] || [[word:dodhareshe|dodhareshe]] || [[word:dodhareke|dodhareke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dodharothotho|dodharothotho]] || [[word:dodharojojo|dodharojojo]] || [[word:dodharoshosho|dodharoshosho]] || [[word:dodharokoko|dodharokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dodharotho|dodharotho]] || [[word:dodharojo|dodharojo]] || [[word:dodharosho|dodharosho]] || [[word:dodharoko|dodharoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dodharofthof|dodharofthof]] || [[word:dodharofjof|dodharofjof]] || [[word:dodharofshof|dodharofshof]] || [[word:dodharofkof|dodharofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dodharïfthïf|dodharïfthïf]] || [[word:dodharïfjïf|dodharïfjïf]] || [[word:dodharïfshïf|dodharïfshïf]] || [[word:dodharïfkïf|dodharïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dodharïfthïfthïf|dodharïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:dodharïfjïfjïf|dodharïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:dodharïfshïfshïf|dodharïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:dodharïfkïfkïf|dodharïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dodharïfthïf|dodharïfthïf]] || [[word:dodharïfjïf|dodharïfjïf]] || [[word:dodharïfshïf|dodharïfshïf]] || [[word:dodharïfkïf|dodharïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dodharïfthïf|dodharïfthïf]] || [[word:dodharïfjïf|dodharïfjïf]] || [[word:dodharïfshïf|dodharïfshïf]] || [[word:dodharïfkïf|dodharïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dodharæthæ|dodharæthæ]] || [[word:dodharæjæ|dodharæjæ]] || [[word:dodharæshæ|dodharæshæ]] || [[word:dodharækæ|dodharækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dodharathatha|dodharathatha]] || [[word:dodharajaja|dodharajaja]] || [[word:dodharashasha|dodharashasha]] || [[word:dodharakaka|dodharakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dodharatha|dodharatha]] || [[word:dodharaja|dodharaja]] || [[word:dodharasha|dodharasha]] || [[word:dodharaka|dodharaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dodharafthaf|dodharafthaf]] || [[word:dodharafjaf|dodharafjaf]] || [[word:dodharafshaf|dodharafshaf]] || [[word:dodharafkaf|dodharafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dodharasha|dodharasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dodharshësha|dodharshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dodharosha|dodharosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dodharmusha|dodharmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dodharyasha|dodharyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gododharnkshësha|gododharnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gododharnkrosha|gododharnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gododharnkmusha|gododharnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gododharnkyasha|gododharnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dodhadharasha|dodhadharasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dodhadharshësha|dodhadharshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dodhadharosha|dodhadharosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dodhadharmusha|dodhadharmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dodhadharyasha|dodhadharyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gododhadharnkshësha|gododhadharnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gododhadharnkrosha|gododhadharnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gododhadharnkmusha|gododhadharnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gododhadharnkyasha|gododhadharnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dedhærasha|dedhærasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dedhærshësha|dedhærshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dedhærosha|dedhærosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dedhærmusha|dedhærmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dedhæryasha|dedhæryasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godedhærnkshësha|godedhærnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godedhærnkrosha|godedhærnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godedhærnkmusha|godedhærnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godedhærnkyasha|godedhærnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dodhfarasha|dodhfarasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dodhfarshësha|dodhfarshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dodhfarosha|dodhfarosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dodhfarmusha|dodhfarmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dodhfaryasha|dodhfaryasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gododhfarnkshësha|gododhfarnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gododhfarnkrosha|gododhfarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gododhfarnkmusha|gododhfarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gododhfarnkyasha|gododhfarnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
